title: Fix 10 strict TypeScript type-check issues across weather module

plan.summary: Fix 10 strict TypeScript diagnostics (TS18046 and TS7006) across 5 entities in the weather module. All fixes are minimal type annotations — no behavioral changes. Two functions need `err` cast from `unknown` in catch blocks, and three handlers need explicit parameter types on `c`, `lat`, `lon`, and `hour`.

steps.description: Fix fetchWeather function: cast `err` to `Error` in the catch block to resolve TS18046 at line 94 (req 1).
Fix withValidatedCoords function: cast `err` to `Error` in the catch block to resolve TS18046 at line 30 (req 2).
Fix getDirections handler: add `c: Context` type annotation and `lat: number, lon: number` types on the callback to resolve TS7006 at lines 5, 6 (req 3, 4, 5).
Fix getWeather handler: add `c: Context` type annotation, `lat: number, lon: number` on callback, and `hour: any` on the map callback to resolve TS7006 at lines 6, 7, 21 (req 6, 7, 8, 9).
Fix serveApp handler: add `c: Context` type annotation to resolve TS7006 at line 5 (req 10).
Run tests to verify no behavioral regressions.
